chunks.text: ORDER SHEET HIGH COURT OF SINDH CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD Cr. Bail Application No.S- 1315 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on MA 10254/2025. 2. For orders on MA 10255/2025. 28.11.2025. None present for apolicant / surety. Miss Safa Hisbani, A.P.G for State. = 1. Urgency granted. 2. Through this application, applicant seeks release of surety furnished in the present matter. It appears that vide Order dated 27.10.2025 the applicant/accused was granted protective bail by this Court for the period of five days and the required surety was duly submitted by the present applicant/surety. It further appears that after grant of protective bail, the applicant/accused surrendered before the trial Court within stipulated period wherefrom he obtained interim pre-arrest bail vide order dated 30.10.2025, as such surety furnished before this Court is no more required. Miss Safa Hisbani, learned A.P.G, present in Court in some other matters, waives the notice and after going through the record, tendered her no objection for release of surety. In view of above, listed application stands disposed of with direction to the office to release/return the surety to applicant/surety, however, after due verification and identification as per procedure. JUDGE Tufail
